summary: Completion logic now separates acceptance basis view, intervention, review risks, completion answer, and next recommendation routing behind a compatibility export.
fit: This preserves the TypeScript agent-state CLI baseline by keeping subjective acceptance and architecture judgment as review risks for Skills/users while CLI code computes deterministic state and routing surfaces.
implementation_focus: Split src/core/completion.ts into focused modules without changing public imports from core/report or core.ts.
evidence: npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false; npm run test:reporting; npm run test:profile; npm run test:architecture; npm run lint
next: Use this apply record as architecture context when recording Product AC evidence.
